name: Visual Thread
description: Visual inspection of pin and box thread connections for damage galling or corrosion

name: Visual Body
description: Visual inspection of pipe body surface for dents pitting and mechanical damage

name: Full Length Drift
description: Pass API drift mandrel through full pipe length to verify internal clearance

name: Dimensional Inspection
description: Measure OD wall thickness and length against API 5CT specification

name: EMI
description: Electromagnetic inspection for transverse and longitudinal wall defects

name: Hydrostatic Test
description: Hydrostatic pressure test to verify pipe body and connection integrity

name: Thread Gauging
description: Gauge thread connection standoff per API 5B
